vulnerabilities.description: Lack of infrastructure security middleware. Helmet is not implemented to set HTTP security headers.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware in your Express application to set various HTTP headers for security.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing CORS setup with a domain whitelist.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement CORS middleware with a whitelist of trusted domains to ensure only authorized domains can access your API.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is not implemented, making the application vulnerable to DoS attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add rate limiting to control the number of requests a client can make within a timeframe.

vulnerabilities.description: No middleware implemented for RBAC/ABAC authorization checks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement middleware for role-based or attribute-based access control to secure sensitive endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT secrets are being loaded from environment variables, but there is no indication of secure handling to prevent exposure.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure JWT secrets are securely managed and never logged. Use environment variables with strict access controls and validate them at startup.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization is assumed but not explicitly defined for all endpoints.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure input sanitization is applied consistently across all endpoints using validation libraries like Joi or express-validator.
